title: Filosofi Kasir Malam
theme: Menjelajahi ketenangan aneh dan humor gelap seorang kasir malam yang menemukan filosofi hidupnya dari pengulangan absurd serta observasi terhadap perilaku manusia di jam-jam sepi.

cover.prompt: Interior view of a 24-hour convenience store at late night. The cashier counter is central, with softly lit shelves displaying various common products in the background. A beverage cooler on the side emits a gentle, ambient glow. The scene conveys a profound quietness and stillness, with warm overhead lights creating an inviting atmosphere. Cinematic composition, rule of thirds, and shallow depth of field.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Pak Rudi, a night cashier at a 24-hour minimarket, cultivates a calm, almost philosophical outlook amidst the absurd parade of human behavior after midnight. He observes various strange customers, each adding to his unique worldview. The climax arrives when a well-dressed man experiences an existential crisis over forgotten money for biscuits, which Pak Rudi resolves with quiet generosity, solidifying his philosophy that ironic peace can be found in life's absurdities.
meta.target_emotion: ironic amusement, contemplative serenity, dark humor
